instructions: Do not make code or documentation changes without proposing first and receiving explicit approval — present findings and proposals before implementing
Do not take action on the repository without either explicit direction or an approved proposal — this includes reverts and documentation updates
Do not update documentation without proposing the specific changes first
When tests are skipped, surface which tests were skipped and why — this requires manual follow-up for regression confidence
Test locally and validate before proposing changes for CI deployment
Do not remove tests without explicit approval — propose with justification and await approval
